entity.label: Chesil
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Ungodly, a town in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:30); probably the same as Bethul (19:4) and Bethuel (1 Chr. 4:30); now Khelasa.

nodes.label: Chesil
nodes.description: Ungodly, a town in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:30); probably the same as Bethul (19:4) and Bethuel (1 Chr. 4:30); now Khelasa.

verses.text: And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,
